title: FNaF Music Disk Mod
description: This Mod adds Music Discs from Five Nights at Freddys
body:
This is a Mod that adds the Music Disk from Five Nights at Freddy

 

Music:

You Can't Hide by CK9C

It's me by TryHardNinja

Folow Me by TryHardNinja

Stay Calm by Griffinilla

Break My Mind by DAGames

Its Been So Long by The Living Tombstone

After Show by TryHardNinja

Fnaf 1 song by The Living Tombstone

Join Us For A Bite by JT Music

Funtime Dance Floor by CK9C

Get Away by TryHardNinja

Die In A Fire by The Living Tombstone

Five Nights Only by Roomie

Survive The Nights by MandoPony

The Puppet Song by TryHardNinja

Balloons by MandoPony

Left Behind by DAGames

Never Be Alone by Shadrow

It's Time to Die by DAGames

And much more
 

What music should I add, writes in the comments
